title: Spotify: Music and Podcasts
html_text:
Spotify: Music and Podcasts

Songs & Playlists For You

Free

  • 40M Ratings
    4.8
  • Ages
    13+
    In-App Controls
  • Category
    Music
  • Developer
    Spotify
  • Language
    EN
    + 62 More
  • Size
    262.5
    MB

With the Spotify app, you can explore an extensive library of music and podcasts for free. Curate the best playlists and stream millions of free songs, albums, and original podcasts on your phone or tablet. Subscribe to Spotify Premium to download and listen offline wherever you are, and unlock our catalog of audiobooks. Why choose Spotify as your go-to music and podcast app? Here, you can: • Listen to over 100 million songs and 6 million podcast titles • Explore our selection of specially-crafted artist playlists • Easily search for your favorite songs, albums, artists, and podcasts • Discover personalized music recommendations tailored to your unique taste • Subscribe to your favorite free podcasts so you never miss an episode, and even curate your own podcast library Spotify Free is more than a music player - find the sounds you love and stream music and podcasts online, for free. Enjoy personalized playlists or curate and share your own, discover the hottest new releases, explore upcoming events from your favorites, and more. • Stream millions of free songs and podcasts • Create playlists with your favorite music • Share songs and playlists with friends and family (feature restrictions may apply in some regions) • Discover personalized playlists made just for you, and collaborate on playlists with your friends • Enjoy your personal Discover Weekly playlist every week • Stay in the know with the Release Radar and New Music Friday playlists • Find nearby events and gigs by your favorite artists • See your most played songs, genres, artists, and more with yearly Spotify Wrapped • Stream music across your devices with Spotify • Use Spotify Connect and enjoy listening on smart speakers, desktop, laptop, smart TV, Chromecast, PlayStation®, Xbox®, smartwatch, in your car, and more - limited number of device models apply Spotify Premium - a great way to enjoy the benefits of an offline music player, and stream music without WiFi. By pressing download, you can access your songs, playlists, podcasts, and audiobooks offline, wherever you are. • Listen to music, podcasts, and audiobooks - all in one place • Ad-free music listening: enjoy your music with no ad interruptions • Enjoy full on-demand playback • Audiobooks in Premium are currently available in the US, UK, Australia, Ireland, New Zealand, and Canada. Discover 250,000+ audiobook titles with 15 hours/month of available listening for Premium Individual subscribers and Duo & Family plan managers. • Superior sound quality on supported devices • AI DJ: a personalized guide that knows your music taste so well it can choose what to play for you • Enjoy on desktop, phone, tablet, computer, smartwatch, and in your car • Listen and control the listening session together by hosting a Jam in real time with friends • Download songs, podcasts, and audiobooks for offline listening, without an internet connection • No contract required - cancel your subscription whenever you want Spotify lets you play music wherever you are. Listen to your favorite songs and discover new music, podcasts, and audiobooks with the Spotify app! LOVE SPOTIFY? Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/spotify Follow us on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@spotify

Ratings & Reviews

  • 4.8
    out of 5
    40M Ratings

  • Favorite app ever

    11/26/2024

    l.lacx

    I personally love this app. I have had it for over 4 years, and it’s been an app I use daily. If you are thinking about getting it, for sure get the Premium plan, no ads, endless skipping of songs, shuffle play, and a good amount of more things. One thing I will say is frustrating is the constant change of the like button to songs, they removed the heart for whatever reason and with that they made adding a song to a playlist but not your liked songs a lot harder, with a drop down feature you have to scroll down to find the playlist you want. I will say that I love that you can get to choose if you want your playlists public or not because let's be honest some playlists do not need to see the light of day but can still be enjoyed in peace. I also like what they did with the front page, being able to just swipe right to click onto our profile and access our settings much easier. My most favorite feature that might not be new but I did just discover, is on that same page where we access the settings and our profile there is this “Recents” tab where you can go and see all of the songs you’ve listened to and the amount of times I’ve used it to find a song I liked in someone else's playlist, or a podcast episode I was listening to but didn’t save, my lord I love that feature so much. But overall it’s a really good app and something that if you get it, it will be used in your daily life if you are a fanatic music listener.

If you are thinking about getting it, for sure get the Premium plan, no ads, endless skipping of songs, shuffle play, and a good amount of more things. One thing I will say is frustrating is the constant change of the like button to songs, they removed the heart for whatever reason and with that they made adding a song to a playlist but not your liked songs a lot harder, with a drop down feature you have to scroll down to find the playlist you want. I will say that I love that you can get to choose if you want your playlists public or not because let's be honest some playlists do not need to see the light of day but can still be enjoyed in peace. I also like what they did with the front page, being able to just swipe right to click onto our profile and access our settings much easier. My most favorite feature that might not be new but I did just discover, is on that same page where we access the settings and our profile there is this “Recents” tab where you can go and see all of the songs you’ve listened to and the amount of times I’ve used it to find a song I liked in someone else's playlist, or a podcast episode I was listening to but didn’t save, my lord I love that feature so much. But overall it’s a really good app and something that if you get it, it will be used in your daily life if you are a fanatic music listener.

  • Please go back

    11/13/2020

    Emanjeudy

    I love the app but not so much the new update. Please give us a retro date. Also the option to go to your liked songs library and not all your playlist with out liked songs as a playlist. To add whenever I like a album the songs do not save, I have to like each song individually for it to save to my library, or “liked songs playlist”. Whenever I click on the artist it only shows me the artist I follow and then artist suggestions based on music I like. Please just go back to when we click on artist it shows us all artist that we have saved in our library. Or simply JUST A RETRO-DATE FROM AROUND LIKE 2016 please. And the hearts next to the liked songs make no sense when we already know that they are liked songs. You can easily click on it by accident and not remember what song you deleted. The queue should show what songs you recently listened to. Not saying it should show every last song you listened to but at leas like the last 20, just a suggestion to make the app better. Lastly theres only alphabetical quick scroll on our liked songs “playlist”, which should just be a music library as stated before. We need alphabetical quick scroll in all playlist, or at least the ones we decide to put in alphabetical order. Also you should add back the “skip song” when adding an album to a playlist with a song from the album already in it. We only have the option of canceling adding the album to the playlist or just hit add anyway. When will people behind apps realize theres never a need for a unnecessary update.

  • Stop changing the queue!!!!!

    12/29/2022

    I_am_theSquirrel

    Stop changing the way the queue works every single time I use this app! I swear Im this close to subscribing to apple music 👌. Just let me keep the option to play my liked songs randomly or not. Also why did I suddenly lose the option to play my liked songs based on genre?! You guys are killing me with the constant changes. Heres what the people want! To be able to play my liked songs randomly or in or order!!! I like the option sometimes! I also still want to be able to sort my liked songs by genre. Why did that suddenly go away!? I used to like the way you could channel what you want based your mood ‘like “happy”’ and whatnot but whatever, I could deal with the changes you made for whatever reason. Can you please stop changing the way liked songs work every single time I use this app!!!! Its so frustrating when I cant play my liked songs randomly all of a sudden and now I cant play my liked based on genre. FOR WHAT REASON!!!!! Stop making stupid changes all the time! You’re pushing your people to apple music, I swear. I have subscriptions to you both but I still dont want to start using them over you, but I will. All I ask for is some consistency!! I want to be able to play my liked songs by genre, and I want to be able to consistently play my liked songs randomly or in order. I dont know why you change these all the time but you are really pushing to start using apple music or even soundcloud. Keep the consistent good features, and stop changing for the worse all the time!

  • Where’s the functionality?

    09/24/2018

    CoreySomers

    1) I can’t play JUST a playlist or JUST an album. I press play on a playlist or album and the next song doesn’t play on that album!! Why? ⭐️ MOST NEEDED FEATURE⭐️: 2) I can’t quickly add songs to a playlist. I have to touch the “...” and individually add songs to a playlist rather than being able to select multiple songs to transfer to a playlist. This makes it a pain to create playlists unless you simply add an entire album to a playlist, which is the only way to add multiple songs at one time to a playlist. I noticed that you can do this at the bottom of the playlist after you scroll through your songs, but only for “recommended” music which is great, but it’s random and not mine sometimes. You should be able to scroll through your saved music and click on each song you’d like to add to a specific (or multiple) playlist without having to click “...” first. For example, I hate to compare but Apple Music has a feature where you can click “Playlist”>”Edit”>”Add Music” which then brings you to your library to add music from there OR you can search music to add that you have not yet saved or downloaded.3) I love the idea of being able to discover new music and whatnot. Thought I’d add at least one good thing to the list. It’s a great app, but until these issues are fixed, I’m keeping it at 3 stars.Edit: 1st issue resolved with their great tech support team! However, still only 4 stars because I can’t use the mobile app to add multiple songs at one time to a playlist. (This is only a big deal because it takes forever to create a brand new playlist).

gold_text: Spotify: Music and Podcasts Songs & Playlists For You Free With the Spotify app, you can explore an extensive library of music and podcasts for free. Curate the best playlists and stream millions of free songs, albums, and original podcasts on your phone or tablet. Subscribe to Spotify Premium to download and listen offline wherever you are, and unlock our catalog of audiobooks. Why choose Spotify as your go-to music and podcast app? Here, you can: . Listen to over 100 million songs and 6 million podcast titles . Explore our selection of specially-crafted artist playlists . Easily search for your favorite songs, albums, artists, and podcasts . Discover personalized music recommendations tailored to your unique taste . Subscribe to your favorite free podcasts so you never miss an episode, and even curate your own podcast library Spotify Free is more than a music player - find the sounds you love and stream music and podcasts online, for free. Enjoy personalized playlists or curate and share your own, discover the hottest new releases, explore upcoming events from your favorites, and more. . Stream millions of free songs and podcasts . Create playlists with your favorite music Share songs and playlists with friends and family (feature restrictions may apply in some regions) . Discover personalized playlists made just for you, and collaborate on playlists with your friends . Enjoy your personal Discover Weekly playlist every week . Stay in the know with the Release Radar and New Music Friday playlists . Find nearby events and gigs by your favorite artists See your most played songs, genres, artists, and more with yearly Spotify Wrapped . Stream music across your devices with Spotify . Use Spotify Connect and enjoy listening on smart speakers, desktop, laptop, smart TV, Chromecast, PlayStation, Xbox, smartwatch, in your car, and more - limited number of device models apply Spotify Premium - a great way to enjoy the benefits of an offline music player, and stream music without WiFi. By pressing download, you can access your songs, playlists, podcasts, and audiobooks offline, wherever you are. . Listen to music, podcasts, and audiobooks - all in one place . Ad-free music listening: enjoy your music with no ad interruptions . Enjoy full on-demand playback . Audiobooks in Premium are currently available in the US, UK, Australia, Ireland, New Zealand, and Canada. Discover 250,000+ audiobook titles with 15 hours/month of available listening for Premium Individual subscribers and Duo & Family plan managers. . Superior sound quality on supported devices . AI DJ: a personalized guide that knows your music taste so well it can choose what to play for you . Enjoy on desktop, phone, tablet, computer, smartwatch, and in your car . Listen and control the listening session together by hosting a Jam in real time with friends . Download songs, podcasts, and audiobooks for offline listening, without an internet connection . No contract required - cancel your subscription whenever you want Spotify lets you play music wherever you are. Listen to your favorite songs and discover new music, podcasts, and audiobooks with the Spotify app! Favorite app ever I personally love this app. I have had it for over 4 years, and it's been an app I use daily. If you are thinking about getting it, for sure get the Premium plan, no ads, endless skipping of songs, shuffle play, and a good amount of more things. One thing I will say is frustrating is the constant change of the like button to songs, they removed the heart for whatever reason and with that they made adding a song to a playlist but not your liked songs a lot harder, with a drop down feature you have to scroll down to find the playlist you want. I will say that I love that you can get to choose if you want your playlists public or not because let's be honest some playlists do not need to see the light of day but can still be enjoyed in peace. I also like what they did with the front page, being able to just swipe right to click onto our profile and access our settings much easier. My most favorite feature that might not be new but I did just discover, is on that same page where we access the settings and our profile there is this "Recents" tab where you can go and see all of the songs you've listened to and the amount of times I've used it to find a song I liked in someone else's playlist, or a podcast episode I was listening to but didn't save, my lord I love that feature so much. But overall it's a really good app and something that if you get it, it will be used in your daily life if you are a fanatic music listener. I love the app but not so much the new update. Please give us a retro date. Also the option to go to your liked songs library and not all your playlist with out liked songs as a playlist. To add whenever I like a album the songs do not save, I have to like each song individually for it to save to my library, or "liked songs playlist". Whenever I click on the artist it only shows me the artist I follow and then artist suggestions based on music I like. Please just go back to when we click on artist it shows us all artist that we have saved in our library. Or simply JUST A RETRO-DATE FROM AROUND LIKE 2016 please. And the hearts next to the liked songs make no sense when we already know that they are liked songs. You can easily click on it by accident and not remember what song you deleted. The queue should show what songs you recently listened to. Not saying it should show every last song you listened to but at leas like the last 20, just a suggestion to make the app better. Lastly theres only alphabetical quick scroll on our liked songs "playlist", which should just be a music library as stated before. We need alphabetical quick scroll in all playlist, or at least the ones we decide to put in alphabetical order. Also you should add back the "skip song" when adding an album to a playlist with a song from the album already in it. We only have the option of canceling adding the album to the playlist or just hit add anyway. When will people behind apps realize theres never a need for a unnecessary update. Stop changing the way the queue works every single time I use this app! I swear Im this close to subscribing to apple music . Just let me keep the option to play my liked songs randomly or not. Also why did I suddenly lose the option to play my liked songs based on genre ?! You guys are killing me with the constant changes. Heres what the people want! To be able to play my liked songs randomly or in or order !!! I like the option sometimes! I also still want to be able to sort my liked songs by genre. Why did that suddenly go away !? I used to like the way you could channel what you want based your mood 'like "happy"' and whatnot but whatever, I could deal with the changes you made for whatever reason. Can you please stop changing the way liked songs work every single time I use this app !!!! Its so frustrating when I cant play my liked songs randomly all of a sudden and now I cant play my liked based on genre. FOR WHAT REASON !!!!! Stop making stupid changes all the time! You're pushing your people to apple music, I swear. I have subscriptions to you both but I still dont want to start using them over you, but I will. All I ask for is some consistency !! I want to be able to play my liked songs by genre, and I want to be able to consistently play my liked songs randomly or in order. I dont know why you change these all the time but you are really pushing to start using apple music or even soundcloud. Keep the consistent good features, and stop changing for the worse all the time! Data Linked to You What's New> We're always making changes and improvements to Spotify. To make sure you don't miss a thing, just keep your Updates turned on. App Privacy The developer, Spotify, indicated that the app's privacy practices may include handling of data as described below. For more information, see the developer's privacy policy. Data Used to Track You The following data may be used to track you across apps and websites owned by other companies: Contact Info Usage Data Identifiers Data Linked to You The following data may be collected and linked to your identity: Health & Fitness Financial Info Contact Info User Content Identifiers Diagnostics Purchases Location e Contacts Search History Usage Data Other Data Privacy practices may vary, for example, based on the features you use or your age. Learn More Accessibility The developer has not yet indicated which accessibility features this app supports. Learn More Information Seller Spotify Compatibility Requires iOS 16.1 or later.
